'''Jason Walton''' (born 13 June 1990) is a former English professional [[rugby league]] player who played as a {{rlp|sr}} forward or {{rlp|ce}}.

==Background==
Walton was born in [[Leeds]], [[West Yorkshire, England]].

==Career==
His first professional club was also [[Salford Red Devils]] then known as Salford City Reds, playing five matches from the bench before joining [[Batley Bulldogs]] making over 100 appearances. He would rejoin Salford Red Devils for the 2014 season along with fellow Batley Bulldog Greg Johnson making 21 appearances until joining [[London Broncos]] on a deal until the end of 2016. He was released by London and signed a one-year deal with [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] in December 2015.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/35093180|title=Jason Walton: Wakefield Wildcats sign London centre|work=BBC Sport|date=14 December 2015|accessdate=31 January 2017}}</ref>

Walton appeared for England Under-17s against the [[Australian Institute of Sport]] in 2007.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.salfordonline.com/sport.php?func=viewdetails&vdetails=3236 |title=Salford On-Line - England U17s Squad 2007 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120506195805/http://www.salfordonline.com/sport.php?func=viewdetails&vdetails=3236 |archivedate=2012-05-06 }}</ref>  His usual position is {{rlp|ce}}, although he is also used in the [[Rugby league positions#Second-row|second row]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://batleybulldogs.co.uk/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=125:player-template&catid=43:first-team&Itemid=168|title=Batley Bulldogs Profile}}</ref>

==Featherstone Rovers==
Walton signed a two-year Deal with [[RFL Championship]] side the [[Bradford Bulls]].<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.itv.com/news/calendar/2016-09-02/bulls-sign-jason-walton/|title=Bulls sign Jason Walton|work=ITV News|date=2 September 2016|accessdate=31 January 2017}}</ref> However Bradford were liquidated before the start of the 2017 season. Walton then signed with [[Featherstone Rovers]].<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportbulls/15002133.Walton_becomes_first_Bulls_player_to_exit_Odsal/|title=Walton becomes first Bulls player to exit Odsal|work= [[Telegraph & Argus]]|date=4 January 2017|accessdate=31 January 2017}}</ref>
